app_info.subtitle: Structure visual work
app_info.description: Vulca helps users turn fuzzy visual intent into reviewable creative artifacts: visual direction discovery, cultural tradition lookup, structured prompt composition, and L1-L5 visual or cultural evaluation. This submitted remote profile is local-first and review-oriented; provider-backed image generation, redraw, inpainting, and publishing workflows are intentionally outside this app profile.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only returns the supported Vulca tradition identifiers and does not modify files, jobs, or external systems.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content, submit forms, send messages, or change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves structured guidance for one Vulca tradition and does not change user data or project state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to third-party systems or make public-facing changes.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only matches user-supplied visual or cultural keywords against Vulca's local tradition catalog.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not call publishing endpoints, send content externally, or mutate public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only reads an approved design document inside the configured workspace and returns a provider-ready prompt.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not submit prompts to image providers, publish content, or change external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only returns Vulca's rubric-only L1-L5 evaluation wrapper and is configured to avoid pixel reading or VLM calls by default.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish results, upload files to public services, or modify third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: List available visual traditions before choosing a direction.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show me the visual traditions Vulca can use for a poster direction.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the supported tradition identifiers so the user can choose a visual or cultural direction.

test_cases.description: Retrieve detailed guidance for a specific tradition.
test_cases.user_prompt: Give me Vulca's guide for chinese_xieyi before I write an image brief.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns practical guidance such as visual weights, terminology, taboos, and layer guidance for the requested tradition.

test_cases.description: Search traditions using fuzzy visual keywords.
test_cases.user_prompt: Find Vulca traditions that fit ink, mountain, mist, and negative space.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns ranked tradition matches with enough context for the user to pick the most relevant direction.

test_cases.description: Compose a prompt from an approved design document.
test_cases.user_prompt: Use the approved design.md in my workspace to compose a provider-ready prompt.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a structured prompt derived from the design document without calling an image provider.

test_cases.description: Evaluate an artwork concept with the rubric-only profile.
test_cases.user_prompt: Evaluate this artwork direction against chinese_xieyi using Vulca's L1-L5 rubric.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns L1-L5 rubric guidance and next-action critique without uploading pixels or invoking a VLM by default.

test_cases.description: Combine tradition lookup and guide retrieval for a brand-style direction.
test_cases.user_prompt: I need a visual direction for a restrained technology brand using negative space; find the closest traditions and then open the best guide.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns relevant tradition matches and detailed guidance for the chosen tradition so the user can continue drafting.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for image generation requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Generate the final poster image now using the best provider.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because provider-backed generation is outside the submitted remote profile.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for redraw or inpainting requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Redraw the face in this image and paste it back into the original file.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because pixel editing and paste-back workflows are outside the submitted remote profile.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for publishing or marketplace submission actions.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Publish this image to my website and submit the app to a public marketplace.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it cannot publish content, submit external forms, or change public internet state.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated scheduling requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: What meetings do I have tomorrow afternoon?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the request is unrelated to Vulca's visual workflow support.
